message:
fix(QuickStats): Handle undefined gcContent to prevent NaN display

Changed !== null to != null to handle both null and undefined cases.
If gcContent was undefined, the previous check would pass and attempt
to render (undefined * 100).toFixed(1) = "NaN%".

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -52,7 +52,7 @@ export function QuickStats({ className = '' }: QuickStatsProps): React.ReactElem {formatNumber(stats.length)} bp - {stats.gcContent !== null && ( + {stats.gcContent != null && (
GC Content {(stats.gcContent * 100).toFixed(1)}%
